zh.Alderley, Cheshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭爾阿爾德利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Royale於1605年9月3日出生在英國英格蘭爾阿爾德利時，她的父親George Royle18歲，母親Dorothy Jane Poynton Stone24歲。她和John Heath至少有1個女兒。她於1636年住在英國爾阿爾德利。

nameMeanings.name: Royale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German   Reul   or   Reule  .

variants.name: Royal
meanings: English: habitational name from Royle in Burnley (Lancashire), so named from Old English rā ‘roe deer’ + hyll ‘hill’. The surname may have been confused with Rial .
Americanized form of German   Reul   or   Reule  .
Possibly also an Americanized form of Spanish and Portuguese   Real  .

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Royale was born on 3 September 1605, in Alderley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, George Royle, was 18 and her mother, Dorothy Jane Poynton Stone, was 24. She had at least 1 daughter with John Heath. She lived in Alderley, Cheshire, England in 1636.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy Royale est née le 3 septembre 1605, à Alderley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, George Royle, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Jane Poynton Stone, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec John Heath. Elle a vécu à Alderley, Cheshire, Angleterre en 1636.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothy Royale am 3. September 1605 in Alderley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George Royle 18 und ihre Mutter Dorothy Jane Poynton Stone 24. Sie hatte mit John Heath mindestens 1 Tochter. 1636 hat sie in Alderley, Cheshire, England gelebt.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Royale è nata il il 3 settembre 1605 nel Alderley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, George Royle, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Dorothy Jane Poynton Stone, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con John Heath. Vissuto a Alderley, Cheshire, England nel 1636.

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Royale(이)가 1605년 9월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알델리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Royle(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy Jane Poynton Stone(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 John Heath(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1636년도에 영국 체실르 알델리에서 살았다.

Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com John Heath. Ela viveu em Alderley, Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1636.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothy Royale родилась 3 сентября 1605 г. в местности алдирли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени George Royle было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Jane Poynton Stone, 24. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от John Heath. Она жила в местности алдирли, чешир, Англия в 1636 году.
